title: SpaceX’s crypto holdings fall ahead of stock market debut
description: The value of SpaceX’s bitcoin holdings has fallen sharply in the run-up to the expected stock market launch (IPO). The company currently has around 8,285 bitcoins in custody with Coinbase Prime, worth roughly $545 million. This represents a $235 million drop compared with the previous quarter, when bitcoin prices were higher.
